raw_text:

{
  "claims": [
    "Community Solar plus Storage programs can increase clean energy without waiting in CAISO interconnection queues.",
    "Community Solar plus Storage programs can reduce the amount of transmission needed, which is the main driver of increased rates.",
    "Distributed solar can provide energy savings for communities, especially for people living in apartments who haven't had access to rooftop solar.",
    "The CPUC's decision will not create a viable, sustainable community solar program.",
    "Experts believe the current program will result in very little new community solar development and rely on uncertain one-time funding for subsidies.",
    "Community solar projects could be required to be sited only in areas with sufficient local demand to absorb the expected energy exports.",
    "Compensation at avoided cost would be just and reasonable if community solar projects are located where local demand exists."
  ]
}
